pages.title: International Remote Work Policy
pages.content: This page outlines international remote work best practices. Many organizations adopt a 90-day maximum remote work limit per year for employees working from another country, subject to local regulations. It is a common best practice to require written approval from their manager and HR for any remote work arrangement exceeding 90 days. This ensures compliance with tax and labor laws and reduces corporate risk.

pages.title: Office Reopening FAQ
pages.content: As of Q4 2024, our offices are open with no capacity restrictions. Employees may work from the office full-time or adopt a hybrid schedule. All visitors must check in at the front desk.

pages.title: Travel Expense Guidelines
pages.content: Travel expenses for client visits must be submitted within 30 days. Receipts are required for expenses over $25. International travel requires pre-approval from a director.
